chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LAR.KANA C. P. No.D-815 of 2016 el DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.9.2016. Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, advocate for petitioner, alongwith petitioner Mr. Qazi Mohammad Bux, State Counsel, alongwith Niaz Hussain Siyal, Mukhtiarkar, Taluka Ratodero and SIP lmamuddin Chandio, SHO P.S Ratodero. SHO P.S Ratodero is present and states that he has been posted at Police Station Ratodero five months back and during the tenure of his posting no application for providing police force/escort for the protection of revenue staff for the demarcation of the land has been made by the Mukhtiarkar, Ratodero and if such application is moved, he will provide the required protection. The Mukhtiarkar, Taluka Ratodero is present in person and submits that he would act upon the application of the petitioner for the demarcation of the land within 15 days afer making application to SHO P.S Ratodero. In view of the statement of Mukhtiarkar, Taluka Ratodero as well as SHO P.S Ratodero, the learned Counsel for the petitioner being satisfied does not press this petition, which stands disposed of accordingly J DGE JUDGE For Katcha Peshi. -/i
